name: 11_v_is_tiny_positive_boundary
description: Boundary: vwap is a tiny strictly positive number (1e-9). Confirms the `v > 0` guard is STRICT (0.0 fails, 1e-9 passes). Division produces a large finite ratio.
derivation: AAPL in live_vwaps; v = 1e-9 > 0 -> guard passes (strictness against v=0.0 confirmed). (p-v)/v = (2e-9 - 1e-9) / 1e-9 = 1e-9 / 1e-9 = 1.0 exactly (algebraically; float arithmetic produces 1.0 with negligible drift, within the test's rel=1e-9 tolerance). alloc * 1.0 = 1.0. weight += 1.0. Final: (1.0, 1.0).
